name: Battle Prep Timer
description: Warmup countdown before combat; teams locked to main base until it ends.
attributes:
[Attribute("0", UIWidgets.CheckBox, "Show battle prep timer", category: "Battle Prep")]
protected bool m_bShowBattlePrepTimer;

[Attribute("600", UIWidgets.Slider, "Battle prep duration (s)", "1 1800 1", category: "Battle Prep")]
protected int m_iBattlePrepTimeS;
notes: Add a BattlePrepTimerHUD.layout (see layout_recipe timer_hud) and drive it from the timer
Implement SetBattlePrepEnded() to unlock spawning / enable seizing
